title: Area Chart Schema
description: Intermediate representation for area chart diagrams. LLM extracts data from natural language into this format, then rendering pipeline generates HTML/SVG from it.

diagramType.description: Identifies this JSON as an area chart. Must always be 'area'.

title.description: Chart title, displayed at the top of the rendered page.

subtitle.description: Optional subtitle shown below the title, typically describing the unit or scope.

style.description: Visual style preset. Each style has its own template and design rules.

format.description: Output format. HTML is the default (single-file with inline SVG and CSS). SVG outputs standalone SVG. Mermaid is NOT supported for area charts.

density.description: Layout density. compact=tighter spacing; normal=standard; spacious=generous spacing.

smooth.description: Whether to use smooth Bezier curves (Catmull-Rom interpolation) for area edges. false=straight line segments (default).

variant.description: Multi-series arrangement. overlaid=series drawn on top of each other with transparency (default). stacked=series stacked cumulatively.

opacity.description: Fill opacity for area fills. Lower values allow seeing overlapping areas.

series.description: Data series. Each series contains data points with labels and values. Multiple series are displayed as overlaid or stacked areas.

items.description: A data series containing named data points.

name.description: Series name displayed in the legend.

color.description: Optional color override for this series area fill and stroke. Must be 6-digit hex (#RRGGBB). If omitted, uses the chart palette.

data.description: Data points in this series. Each has a label and numeric value.

axis.description: Axis configuration for both X and Y axes.

legend.description: Legend configuration. Auto-generated from series names if not provided.

colors.description: Optional color overrides for the style's environment colors (background, text, etc.). Does NOT affect data area colors — use series[].color for that.

metadata.description: Optional metadata. author field is for internal tracking only and MUST NOT be rendered into the output.
